title: Pick'em
locked: Picks are locked. The tournament has started
lockedDescription: You can still view your picks, but no further edits are possible.

groups.title: Predict the group stage
groups.subtitleMobile: Drag teams to set the finishing order for each group. 1st & 2nd advance automatically; 3rd goes to next step.
groups.tipsBody: Drag the <handle></handle> to reorder teams within each group.
groups.tipsLockBody: Tap the <lockIcon></lockIcon> on each group when you're sure about the order. You can still change it anytime before the tournament starts.

bestThirds.title: Best third-place teams
bestThirds.subtitle: From your 12 third-place teams, pick the {total} you think will advance to the Round of 32.
bestThirds.moreNeeded: {n, plural, one {# more selection needed} other {# more selections needed}}

bracket.title: Build your bracket
bracket.subtitleDesktop: Pick the winner of every knockout match from the Round of 32 to the Final.

toasts.picksClearedByGroupChange: {n, plural, one {Your bracket changed: # pick was cleared.} other {Your bracket changed: # picks were cleared.}}
toasts.groupsChangedReset: Group order changed. Best thirds and bracket picks were reset.
toasts.thirdsChangedReset: Best thirds changed. Bracket picks were reset.
toasts.submitFailed: Could not submit your bracket. Try again.
toasts.selectAllThirdsFirst: Pick all 8 best thirds before continuing
